title: nama aretioides var. californica
intro: Nama aretioides var. californica, also known as California plains-bean or California bee plant, is a plant species in the borage family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities, making it effective in treating wounds and skin irritations. The plant is also valued for its health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and supporting immune function. The herbal preparations of Nama aretioides var. californica include infusions, decoctions, and salves, which can be used topically or taken internally to reap its benefits.
